prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.6 kg; Height 155.6 cm; BMI 34.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 209mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 204mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.2kg; 9 months ago 81.8kg; 6 months ago 82.1kg; 3 months ago 82.7kg; current 82.6kg), Height (12 months ago 155.6cm; 9 months ago 155.6cm; 6 months ago 155.6cm; 3 months ago 155.6cm; current 155.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 34.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 85U/L; 9 months ago 83U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 76U/L; current 78U/L), AST (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 91U/L; 6 months ago 89U/L; 3 months ago 90U/L; current 85U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 72mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 71mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 71mL/min/1.73m²; current 69mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 18mg/g; 9 months ago 13mg/g; 6 months ago 13mg/g; 3 months ago 13mg/g; current 17mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.6g/dL; 9 months ago 13.7g/dL; 6 months ago 14.4g/dL; 3 months ago 14.3g/dL; current 13.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
